seoTitle: Crows Nest vs Crowther Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Crows Nest and Crowther Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Crows Nest vs Crowther Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crows Nest and Crowther Island.
heading: Crows Nest vs Crowther Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crows Nest, New South Wales and Crowther Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crowther Island has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Crows Nest (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crows Nest or Crowther Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crows Nest has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Crowther Island scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crows Nest scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Crowther Island scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crows Nest or Crowther Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crowther Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
